name: Standard Key
description: Authorises the opening of one BEDROCK loot case. Single use — consumed on case open.

name: BANANA CRATE
description: Sealed loot case from rocks.exe. Open with a Standard Key to receive one item from the Banana reward set.

name: CAPS CASE
description: Sealed loot case from rocks.exe. Open with a Standard Key to receive one item from the Cap reward set.

name: EDITION CASE
description: Sealed loot case from rocks.exe. Open with a Standard Key to receive one item from the Edition reward set.

name: INGOT LOCKBOX
description: Sealed loot case from rocks.exe. Open with a Standard Key to receive one item from the Ingot reward set.

name: MINERAL CACHE
description: Sealed loot case from rocks.exe. Open with a Standard Key to receive one item from the Aetherite reward set.

name: MYTHRIL CACHE

name: SHARD CASE

name: SODA CRATE
description: Sealed loot case from rocks.exe. Open with a Standard Key to receive one item from the Soda reward set.

name: CAPS CASE REWARD GENERATOR
description: Hidden reward generator for CAPS CASE.

name: BANANA CRATE OPEN
description: Hidden generator used to open BANANA CRATE. Consumes one BANANA CRATE and one Standard Key, grants one reward item. Not user-visible.

name: CAPS CASE OPEN
description: Hidden generator used to open CAPS CASE. Consumes one CAPS CASE and one Standard Key, grants one reward item. Not user-visible.

name: EDITION CASE OPEN
description: Hidden generator used to open EDITION CASE. Consumes one EDITION CASE and one Standard Key, grants one reward item. Not user-visible.

name: INGOT LOCKBOX OPEN
description: Hidden generator used to open INGOT LOCKBOX. Consumes one INGOT LOCKBOX and one Standard Key, grants one reward item. Not user-visible.

name: MINERAL CACHE OPEN
description: Hidden generator used to open MINERAL CACHE. Consumes one MINERAL CACHE and one Standard Key, grants one reward item. Not user-visible.

name: MYTHRIL CACHE OPEN
description: Hidden generator used to open MYTHRIL CACHE. Consumes one MYTHRIL CACHE and one Standard Key, grants one reward item. Not user-visible.

name: ORE CASE OPEN
description: Hidden generator used to open ORE CASE. Consumes one ORE CASE and one Standard Key, grants one reward item. Not user-visible.

name: PEPE CRATE OPEN
description: Hidden generator used to open PEPE CRATE. Consumes one PEPE CRATE and one Standard Key, grants one reward item. Not user-visible.

name: SHARD CASE OPEN
description: Hidden generator used to open SHARD CASE. Consumes one SHARD CASE and one Standard Key, grants one reward item. Not user-visible.

name: SODA CRATE OPEN
description: Hidden generator used to open SODA CRATE. Consumes one SODA CRATE and one Standard Key, grants one reward item. Not user-visible.

name: Bedrock Token
description: Internal exchange token. Legacy — the live build grants cases directly via the relay server. Not user-visible.

name: VOUCHER SEED
description: Internal seed token. Bridge automatically exchanges it for 100 BEDROCK TOKENS. Has no standalone use.

name: VOUCHER UNPACK
description: Hidden exchange generator: consumes 1 VOUCHER SEED, grants 100 BEDROCK TOKENS.

name: BANANA CRATE GRANT
description: Hidden internal exchange generator: consumes 1 BEDROCK token, grants 1 BANANA CRATE. Legacy — the live build uses the Steam Web API path. Not user-visible.

name: CAPS CASE GRANT
description: Hidden internal exchange generator: consumes 1 BEDROCK token, grants 1 CAPS CASE. Legacy — the live build uses the Steam Web API path. Not user-visible.

name: EDITION CASE GRANT
description: Hidden internal exchange generator: consumes 1 BEDROCK token, grants 1 EDITION CASE. Legacy — the live build uses the Steam Web API path. Not user-visible.

name: INGOT LOCKBOX GRANT
description: Hidden internal exchange generator: consumes 1 BEDROCK token, grants 1 INGOT LOCKBOX. Legacy — the live build uses the Steam Web API path. Not user-visible.

name: MINERAL CACHE GRANT
description: Hidden internal exchange generator: consumes 1 BEDROCK token, grants 1 MINERAL CACHE. Legacy — the live build uses the Steam Web API path. Not user-visible.

name: MYTHRIL CACHE GRANT
description: Hidden internal exchange generator: consumes 1 BEDROCK token, grants 1 MYTHRIL CACHE. Legacy — the live build uses the Steam Web API path. Not user-visible.

name: ORE CASE GRANT
description: Hidden internal exchange generator: consumes 1 BEDROCK token, grants 1 ORE CASE. Legacy — the live build uses the Steam Web API path. Not user-visible.

name: PEPE CRATE GRANT
description: Hidden internal exchange generator: consumes 1 BEDROCK token, grants 1 PEPE CRATE. Legacy — the live build uses the Steam Web API path. Not user-visible.

name: SHARD CASE GRANT
description: Hidden internal exchange generator: consumes 1 BEDROCK token, grants 1 SHARD CASE. Legacy — the live build uses the Steam Web API path. Not user-visible.

name: SODA CRATE GRANT
description: Hidden internal exchange generator: consumes 1 BEDROCK token, grants 1 SODA CRATE. Legacy — the live build uses the Steam Web API path. Not user-visible.
